xsjs: function handlePost(param){ var after = param.afterTableName; var pstmt = param.connection.prepareStatement('select * from "'+after+'"'); var rs = pstmt.executeQuery(); while (rs.next()){ var PAYLOAD = rs.getNstring(2); } var oInput = JSON.parse(AES.Decode(PAYLOAD)); var CASID = oInput.CASID; var cstmt = param.connection.prepareCall('CALL "ABC.PROCEDURES::prCreateTravelnfo"(?,?,?)'); cstmt.setBigInt(1, oInput.OTRID); cstmt.setBigInt(2, CASID); cstmt.setNString(3, oInput.OTRNM); cstmt.execute(); var returnObj = { "Success" : "All Travel Info Submitted" }; pstmt = param.connection.prepareStatement('update "'+after+'" set PAYLOAD=?'); pstmt.setNString(1, JSON.stringify(returnObj)); pstmt.executeUpdate(); }
nodejs: async function handlePost(req){ const { PAYLOAD } = req.data; const oInput = JSON.parse(await AES.Decode(PAYLOAD)); const CASID = oInput.CASID; await cds.run('CALL "ABC.PROCEDURES::prCreateTravelnfo"(?,?,?)', [oInput.OTRID, CASID, oInput.OTRNM]); const returnObj = { "Success": "All Travel Info Submitted" }; return JSON.stringify(returnObj); }
description: sample post call with stored procedure execution and payload decoding

xsjs: function handlePost(param){ var pstmt = param.connection.prepareStatement('select PAYLOAD from "INPUT_TABLE"'); var rs = pstmt.executeQuery(); while(rs.next()){ var payload = rs.getNString(1); } var data = JSON.parse(payload); var stmt = param.connection.prepareCall('CALL "ABC.PROCEDURES::prInsertUser"(?,?)'); stmt.setString(1, data.USER_ID); stmt.setString(2, data.USER_NAME); stmt.execute(); }
nodejs: async function handlePost(req){ const { PAYLOAD } = req.data; const data = JSON.parse(PAYLOAD); await cds.run('CALL "ABC.PROCEDURES::prInsertUser"(?,?)', [data.USER_ID, data.USER_NAME]); return { message: "User inserted" }; }
description: simple payload read and stored procedure insert

xsjs: function handlePost(param){ var pstmt = param.connection.prepareStatement('select DATA from "ORDERS"'); var rs = pstmt.executeQuery(); while(rs.next()){ var dataStr = rs.getNString(1); } var obj = JSON.parse(dataStr); var stmt = param.connection.prepareCall('CALL "ABC.PROCEDURES::prProcessOrder"(?,?,?)'); stmt.setInteger(1, obj.ORDER_ID); stmt.setDouble(2, obj.AMOUNT); stmt.setString(3, obj.STATUS); stmt.execute(); }
nodejs: async function handlePost(req){ const { DATA } = req.data; const obj = JSON.parse(DATA); await cds.run('CALL "ABC.PROCEDURES::prProcessOrder"(?,?,?)', [obj.ORDER_ID, obj.AMOUNT, obj.STATUS]); return { message: "Order processed" }; }
description: order processing with multiple parameter types

xsjs: function handlePost(param){ var pstmt = param.connection.prepareStatement('select PAYLOAD from "LOGS"'); var rs = pstmt.executeQuery(); while(rs.next()){ var payload = rs.getNString(1); } var obj = JSON.parse(payload); var stmt = param.connection.prepareCall('CALL "ABC.PROCEDURES::prLogEvent"(?,?)'); stmt.setString(1, obj.EVENT_ID); stmt.setString(2, obj.DESCRIPTION); stmt.execute(); var updateStmt = param.connection.prepareStatement('update "LOGS" set STATUS=?'); updateStmt.setString(1, 'PROCESSED'); updateStmt.executeUpdate(); }
nodejs: async function handlePost(req){ const { PAYLOAD } = req.data; const obj = JSON.parse(PAYLOAD); await cds.run('CALL "ABC.PROCEDURES::prLogEvent"(?,?)', [obj.EVENT_ID, obj.DESCRIPTION]); return { status: "PROCESSED" }; }
description: event logging with update after procedure call
